temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a mustache, wearing a dark suit and tie. He is in a dimly lit, dark environment. The audio begins with a sharp, metallic click, like a gun being cocked, followed by a soft, rustling sound. He looks down and to his right with a serious expression as he appears to handle a small, dark object. In the upper left corner, the Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in white. The camera remains steady, maintaining a tight focus on the man's face and upper body. The man continues to look down, his expression intense. Another person's hand, holding a dark, cylindrical object, enters the frame from the right and moves towards the man. The background remains dark and indistinct. The "风行网" text is still present. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the second person, who is also in a suit. The first man looks up slightly, his gaze now directed at the person approaching him. The second person, wearing glasses, brings the object, which appears to be a small case or device, closer to the first man. The shot is a close-up, capturing the tense interaction between the two individuals. The camera pulls back to a medium shot, showing both men more clearly. The first man, now seen from the chest up, sits at a table. He is smoking, with a plume of smoke rising around him. He gestures with his hands as he speaks. The second man, still holding the device, is visible on the right side of the frame. The "风行网" text remains in the upper left corner. A man then speaks in a calm, low, and slightly menacing tone, saying, "自己小心点" (Be careful). His voice is steady and controlled, carrying a threatening undertone. The background is silent, with no music, which amplifies the tension of the moment.
